chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-3700 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE PRIORITY. 1. FOR ORDERS ON CMA NO.17691 OF 2025. 2. FOR HEARING OF CMA NO.15295 OF 2025. 3. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. 29.08.2025 Mr. Ahmed Ali Ghumro, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr. Mushtaq Ahmed Chandio, Advocate for Respondent Nos.3 & 4. Mr. Taha Abdul Samad, Advocate for Respondent No.4. Mr. Mehran Khan Mehar, Assistant A.G. --------------------- Compliance Reports have been filed by the learned counsel for the Petitioners as well as counsel for the Respondent Nos. 3 & 4, which are taken on record; copies of the same have been provided to other sides. Learned counsel for the Petitioners under instructions does not press the instant Petition which is dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
